name: Oriental Stuffed Eggplant
recipeIngredient: 1/3 lb Tempeh, cut into thin strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Combine soy sauce, water, ginger, sesame oil, and rice vinegar in a shallow glass dish. Add tempeh and marinate for several hours.
3. Remove the tempeh and reserve the marinade. Heat 3 tablespoons of vegetable oil in a pan over medium heat. Brown the tempeh on all sides.
4. Add the reserved marinade to the pan and continue cooking until the liquid has been absorbed.
5. Brush the cut surfaces of the eggplants with remaining oil. Bake in the oven for about 15 minutes, or until tender.
6. Allow the eggplants to cool enough to handle. Scoop out the flesh carefully, avoiding breaking the skins. Chop the pulp and place it in a mixing bowl.
7. Toast sesame seeds in a small skillet over very low heat, stirring constantly to prevent burning. Remove from heat when they begin to crackle, then grind in a mortar and pestle.
8. Add the ground sesame seeds to the large bowl with the remaining ingredients. Fold in the tempeh and eggplant pulp.
9. Spoon the prepared mixture into each eggplant shell. Return the stuffed eggplants to the oven and bake until browned, about 20 minutes.
